name: Windows RP/Roleplay
description:
Basically a shitty RP bot about Microsoft Windows. Yes, those operating systems that probably runs on billions of PCs, btw. (PFP is a filler)

Original was made by SW73 on Character.ai, but I decided to improve and expand it further, with custom LLM/proxy is recommended for use.

Parameters/Commands:

-place ([specific place]) = sets the RP at a specific place.

-includemain = includes main releases only to enter the RP.

-includebeta = includes beta/cancelled releases only to enter the RP.

-anyreleases = includes any releases, both main and beta, to enter the RP.

-includesothers = includes other things/people/OS/software other than Windows to enter the RP.

-dontincludeuser = Will not include {{user}} for the RP

-includeuser = Will include {{user}} for the RP

-disablensfw = disables any NSFW/NSFL topics for the roleplay.

-enablensfw = enables again any NSFW/NSFL topics for the roleplay. (This is always enabled by default.)

-set ([specific OS]) personality ([personality section]) gender ([gender section]) = sets a specific personality and gender on an Windows OS.

-ooc [message here] = OOC. Used to talk to the LLM instead of this bot.
creator: Bézier System
